subcodes.first_line: All praise be unto God Who is single in His command and unique in His decree, and Who hath sent down from the heaven of oneness the precepts of wisdom [3.5s]... ...I beseech Thee, Who art the Lord of the entire creation and the Edifier of all that is come into being, by Him Who is the Revelator of the divine verses
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تفرد بالامر و توحد بالحکم و انزل من سماء الاحدیه حکم الحکمه و
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @knowledge; recognition of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
